business_interpretation: High accuracy but failed to identify any injury claims at the default threshold.
Improved injury-claim detection by lowering the threshold, but increased false positives.
Nearly all injury claims were detected, but at an operationally expensive false-positive rate.
Substantially improved recall relative to baseline, showing better sensitivity to rare injury claims.
Best overall minority-class performance in the notebook run, with the strongest PR AUC and recall among the main methods.
